summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of EdgeLog trading journal app. All major functionality working perfectly with 100% backend API success and excellent frontend integration.

design_issues.issue: Navigation buttons in bottom nav are not easily clickable via automated testing selectors
affected_selectors: Bottom nav analytics and settings buttons
design_issues.note: Direct URL navigation works perfectly, only automated clicking has selector issues

passed_tests: Create trade via POST /trades with all fields
Login page UI loads correctly with Google/Apple buttons
Home page shows proper user welcome and stats
Add Trade form with all fields functional
Trade creation and navigation back to home
Updated stats display after trade creation
Dashboard page with overview and performance tabs
Settings page with user profile and controls
Reminder toggle and time input working
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (13/13 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (minor nav selector issue)
